description_long: This object consists of two rectangular bars of soap, each with a soft pink hue and a slightly rounded edge, stacked neatly on a flat surface. The bars are compact and have a smooth, matte finish, with subtle horizontal grooves visible on the sides, suggesting a classic soap bar design. The top surfaces are flat and unmarked, while the sides display faint lines that may indicate branding or decorative ridges. The soap bars appear solid and uniform in color, with no visible packaging or wrapping. Their size and shape are typical for hand-held soap, making them suitable for personal hygiene use. The overall appearance is clean, simple, and functional, with no visible signs of wear or residue.
description: Two pink rectangular bars of soap with smooth, matte surfaces and subtle horizontal grooves, stacked together.
description_view_0: Two pink soap bars stacked on a flat surface, viewed from above with the top surfaces and some side grooves visible.
description_view_1: Front-facing view showing the stacked arrangement and the horizontal grooves on the sides of the soap bars.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the length of the soap bars and the alignment of their edges and grooves.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back sides of the stacked soap bars with visible grooves and flat surfaces.
attribute_packaging_design: The soap bars are unwrapped, rectangular, and feature a soft pink color with subtle horizontal grooves along the sides. There are no visible graphics, logos, or additional design elements.
